providers.name: OpenAI Whisper API
providers.notes: Simple, widely supported batch transcription. No native diarization or streaming.

providers.name: Deepgram Nova 2
providers.notes: Very fast batch and streaming. Diarization included on many tiers. Usage discounts at scale.

providers.name: AssemblyAI Universal
providers.notes: Strong diarization, PII redaction, and summarization as add-ons. Good for meeting assistants.

providers.name: Google Cloud Speech-to-Text
providers.notes: Pay-per-15-seconds model. Enhanced model costs more; diarization included in some tiers.

providers.name: Azure Speech Services
providers.notes: Commitment tiers lower effective rate. Strong enterprise controls and custom model support.

providers.name: Amazon Transcribe
providers.notes: Low per-minute rate; medical and call analytics are separate SKUs.

providers.name: Rev AI
providers.notes: Premium human + ASR hybrid available. Higher per-minute cost for higher accuracy.

providers.name: Gladia
providers.notes: Simple API with diarization and summarization bundled in some plans.
